name: Perf Mkt - Windows - Zip Level Performance

content.query:
SELECT
zipPerf.[ZipCode]
,zipPerf.[HouseholdsPerZipCode]
,zipPerf.[AverageHouseValue]
,zipPerf.[IncomePerHousehold]
,zipPerf.[PopulationEstimate]
,zipPerf.[MedianAge]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2023-01-01' and '2023-03-31' then NetSalesAmount else 0 end) as [3MoNetSalesAmount]
,sum([NetSalesAmount]) as [NetSalesAmount]
,zonda.[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,sum([LeadCount]) as [LeadCount]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2023-01-01' and '2023-03-31' then LeadCount else 0 end) as [3MoLeadCount]
,sum([ApptSet]) as [ApptSet]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2023-01-01' and '2023-03-31' then ApptSet else 0 end) as [3MoApptSet]
,sum([NetSold]) as [NetSold]
,sum(case when EntryMonth between '2023-01-01' and '2023-03-31' then NetSold else 0 end) as [3MoNetSold]
,zipPerf.[City]
,zipPerf.[County]
,zipPerf.[State]
,zipPerf.[County] + ' (' + zipPerf.[State] + ')' as CountyStateCombo
FROM 
[RDM].[REF_PRODUCT_ZIP_CODES] prdZip
inner join [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_ZIP_CODE_PERFORMANCE] zipPerf
on prdZip.ZipCode = zipPerf.ZipCode
left join ODS.MKTDATA_ZONDA_ZIP_CODE_INDEX zonda
on zipPerf.ZipCode = zonda.ZipCode
where 
prdZip.Product = 'Windows'
group by 
zipPerf.[ZipCode]
,zipPerf.[HouseholdsPerZipCode]
,zipPerf.[AverageHouseValue]
,zipPerf.[IncomePerHousehold]
,zipPerf.[PopulationEstimate]
,zipPerf.[MedianAge]
,zonda.[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zipPerf.[City]
,zipPerf.[County]
,zipPerf.[State]
